tweet_text: 🚨 Mykhailo Mudryk faces a possible 4-year ban after a positive doping test, keeping him off the pitch for Chelsea since 2024. His daily routine remains under scrutiny. 🏟️⚖️ #ChelseaFC #Mudryk
article_title: Mykhailo Mudryk's mood revealed and what Chelsea star does every day amid ban decision
